Here’s a simple homemade brownie recipe you can make easily 🍫
🍫 Easy Chocolate Brownies
📝 Ingredients:
1/2 cup (115g) butter
1 cup sugar
2 eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract
1/3 cup cocoa powder
1/2 cup flour
1/4 tsp salt
Optional: chocolate chips or nuts
👨‍🍳 Instructions:
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F).
Melt the butter (microwave or stovetop).
Mix melted butter + sugar together.
Add eggs and vanilla. Mix well.
Add cocoa powder, flour, and salt. Mix until smooth (don’t overmix).
Pour into a greased baking pan.
Bake for 20–25 minutes.
Let cool before cutting (this makes them fudgier).
🔥 Tips:
For extra fudgy brownies → bake a little less time.
For cakey brownies → bake a little longer.
Add chocolate chips for extra gooey taste

Ha tutto per esserlo, sia dal punto di vista fisico che tecnico, ma soprattutto dal punto di vista mentale. Io mi ricordo le prime partite da subentrato, èra tutto scoordinato e Sembrava avesse la corrente addosso, guardatelo ora invece.
P. S. ai giocatori bisogna dare tempo, io odio la gente che subito, senza neancbe aver mai visto il giocatore, prende e lo bolla come uno scarso. Athekame sui social frequentati da idioti èra stato già bollato come una pipppa, e Ida quella gente dovrà chiedergli scusa

comments.author: @TWITTY_74
comments.text:
رحلة شعب مش رحلة لاعب يا صلاح 🥺❤ من اللحظة إلي سبت فيها روما وخدتنا معاك في رحلة لسقف العالم رحله المجد رحله الطموح بلا نهايه ❤ ، شلت كل الحواجز و الحدود إلي كانت ممكن تتحط لكل لاعب مصري أو حتى لأي إنسان مصري ، للتاريخ يا صلاح و التاريخ لن ينسى يا مو ❤👑

رغم كل إلي مريت بيه من محاولات إستفزاز و كره و تشويه ليك و لمسيرتك العظيمه سواء في حياتك الشخصيه أو كلاعب محترف لم تقل في نظري أبدا بل كنت ديما القدوه الرائعه و الراسخه في ذهن كل مصري عاشق و متيم بيك يا أعظم ما أنجبت مصر على مر التاريخ ، مش عارف أقول إيه 💔 كان عندي و لو أمل واحد في المئه أنك تكمل لموسم كمان في ليفربول أو في الدوري الانجليزي بشكل عام لأنك تستاهل تنهي الموسم الأخير ليك بشكل أفضل يا صلاح ❤ لكن لكل قصه عظيمه نهاية ❤ الواحد مش مستوعب أن كان ممكن يجي الوقت و نوصل لهذه النقطه 💔 نقطه النهايه ❤

أخيراً و لا أخفي على أحد بحبك و بحترمك لأنك في أوقات كانت الحاله النفسيه للبني آدم مش أفضل شئ ، إنت كنت المخرج الوحيد إلي بتخرج الإنسان من الاكتئاب النفسي إلي هو فيه ، ديما كنت مصدر سعاده ليا بشكل شخصي كأن أخويا هو إلي بيحقق هذا الإنجاز ❤

نهايه فصل لأعظم لاعب في تاريخ كره القدم الأفريقية و العربيه ، تحيه للاسطوره و الكينج محمد صلاح
You will never walk alone ❤👑🫡

comments.text: Rested ? Haven’t seen him all season 😂

comments.author: @pablomar69er
comments.text: Madueke and Max don't waste time on the ball. They immediately attack the defense, and they are unpredictable and therefore difficult to set up against. Madueke also plays more like a right winger, because he actually goes DOWN THE RIGHT SIDE, while Saka slows it down and nearly always wants to put it on his left foot. Saka is woefully predictable and needs to adapt his game. That's on him, AND also on the coaches who ought to see what we're seeing every week.

comments.author: @theroach1822
comments.text: Rested is not the word I would use, he needs to be DROPPED!!!!

comments.author: @AndrewPoynter-q9y
comments.text: Funny how it has happened since he got that massive pay rise.

comments.author: @joshuaw9675
comments.text: He needs to be dropped not rested, his performances this season don’t warrant a spot in the starting lineup. He needs to understand he’s not indispensable, this isn’t the Arsenal of 2-3 seasons ago that relied  heavily on Saka to make things happen for us

comments.author: @Deenonamous
comments.text: You can tell saka knows he’s playing badly, his confidence is on the floor. He needs this season to end, and just rest for a bit, physically and mentally.

comments.author: @pablomar69er
comments.text:
Saka's fitness is not the issue, his style of play is the problem. He's dreadfully predictable: gets the ball, slows down to give defenders time to close and double team him, then he tries the same moves every time (cut inside to put it on his left foot). He's very easy to mark. And he seems not to have figured out that he needs to enhance his game by
1. Making up his mind faster and just go, and
2. Going down the right side more. He's a right winger that always looks to go left, it's ridiculous.
And the coaches and manager all seem clueless about this because nothing seems to have been done to help Saka advance his game.

comments.author: @Sam_saaaam
comments.text: Play him on the left side, then bring him back to his usual position.

comments.author: @alvinmackmack
comments.text: You guys are right I think he needs to sit a bit
